testcase.name: test_valid_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected element '#dashboard-header' to be visible after login but it was not found. Session expired or login redirect failed.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Expected element '#dashboard-header' to be visible after login but it was not found. File "test_evite_login.py", line 48, in test_valid_login self.assertTrue(self.driver.find_element(By.ID, "dashboard-header").is_displayed()) selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"#dashboard-header"} (Session info: chrome=122.0.6261.94)
